builds.name: CordCutter Base
builds.description: Free Verified Services Only w Live TV.
builds.changelog: Standard release with verified legal streaming sources and automatic guide sync.

builds.name: CordCutter Plus
builds.description: Base Build with 3rd Party Addons for music, sports, kids, movies, tv and premium live tv.
builds.changelog: Plus release including 3rd party addons for expanded categories.

builds.name: CordCutter Plus w Gaming
builds.changelog: Plus Gaming release adding IAGL retro gaming integration via Archive.org.

builds.name: CordCutter Pro
builds.changelog: Pro release adding Jellyfin integration via JellyCon.

builds.name: CordCutter Pro w Gaming
builds.changelog: Pro Gaming release adding IAGL retro gaming integration via Archive.org.

builds.name: CordCutter Fresh Start
builds.description: Clean slate restore with CutCableWizard, Unknown Sources enabled and Any Repositories set.
builds.changelog: Internal clean slate build used by the Fresh Start function.
